title: leucas biflora
intro: Leucas biflora is a species of plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leucas biflora include relief from congestion, bronchitis, and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Leucas biflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies in various parts of the world.
